title: ValidateRequest
description: Request body for POST /validate. Carries ONLY the public ISIN, the client's locally-computed tier hashes, and a bitmap of which fields the client has values for. There is intentionally no field that accepts bond field VALUES — that is the load-bearing privacy property documented in the project README.

client_tier_hashes.description: Tier hashes the client computed locally over their static. Only tiers the client has full data for should be sent.

client_field_presence.description: List of canonical schema fields the client has explicit values for. Used to compute which higher tiers the client is missing data for and which fields to recommend sourcing.

schema_version.description: Schema version the client computed hashes under. Server refuses to compare across versions.
